title: D@dan #1719
definition:
Dedan = "low country"

 n pr m
 1) the son of Raamah and grandson of Cush. A  son of Jokshan and
    grandson of Keturah

 n pr loc
 2) a place in south Arabia
nasbUsage:
Definition: Dedan = "low country"

 n pr m
 1) the son of Raamah and grandson of Cush. A  son of Jokshan and
    grandson of Keturah

 n pr loc
 2) a place in south Arabia

    NASB:  a desc. of Ham, also a desc. of Abraham, also the tribes desc. from them
